title: Security FAQ
content:
**Is CloudDesk SOC 2 compliant?** Yes, CloudDesk is SOC 2 Type II certified. Reports available on request for Enterprise customers.

**Is data encrypted?** All data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.2+).

**Where is data stored?** Data is stored in AWS us-east-1 by default. EU data residency available on Enterprise plans.

**Can I use SSO?** Yes, SAML 2.0 / OIDC SSO is available on Enterprise plans. Supports Okta, Azure AD, Google Workspace.

**How do I report a security vulnerability?** Email security@clouddesk.io with details. We follow responsible disclosure and respond within 48 hours.

**Are API keys logged?** API key usage is logged and visible under Settings → Developer → Audit Logs.
